ddls:
CREATE TABLE "config_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration option */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration option */,
  "option_type" TEXT /* Type of the configuration option (e.g., Array, String, Object) */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the configuration option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration option */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the option is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the option */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the option was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the option */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the option was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the configuration option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_values" (
  "value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each option value */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the option value */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the value is the default value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the value */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the value was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the value */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_values_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES config_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_defaults" (
  "default_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each default value */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the configuration option */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the default value */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the default value */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the default value was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the default value */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the default value was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("default_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_defaults_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES config_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "text_extraction_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each text extraction method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the text extraction method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the text extraction method */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the method */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the method was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the method */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the method was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "header_controls" (
  "control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each header control */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "control_type" TEXT /* Type of header control (e.g., sorter, filter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the header control */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the control is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the control */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the control was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the control */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the control was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_header_controls_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES config_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forced_sorting" (
  "sort_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forced sort */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "sort_order" TEXT /* Order of the forced sort */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forced sort */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the forced sort is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the forced sort */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the forced sort was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the forced sort */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the forced sort was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sort_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forced_sorting_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES config_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, administrator, user) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user account */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user account */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user option */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the configuration option for the user */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user option */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user option is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the user option */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user option was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the user option */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user option was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_options_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "changed_date" TEXT /* Date the option was changed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the configuration option */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the option */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_history_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES config_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "option_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_option_comments_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES config_options ("option_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the role */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the role was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the role */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "option_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration option */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission level (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is active */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the permission */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the permission */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_option_id FOREIGN KEY ("option_id") REFERENCES config_options ("option_id")
)
